b001_openai.revisedPrompt: Cinematic 3:2 wide website hero background for a 30th high school reunion website. An open 1996 high school yearbook lying on a polished wooden table, pages visible but with absolutely no readable text, typography blurred/abstract. Warm nostalgic film grain, premium editorial photography style. Red, white, and silver school-color accents as subtle ribbons, confetti, or decor near the edges. Soft depth of field, tasteful dramatic lighting with warm highlights and gentle shadows. No people, no logos, no mascot character. Clean uncluttered center safe area with negative space for an HTML headline overlay. Wide composition, high resolution, elegant, nostalgic, cinematic.
b001_openai.estimatedCostNote: Estimate only; exact billing not returned. Medium landscape image uses 1568 image output tokens per OpenAI docs plus text tokens.
